title: Green Blade - Wooden Handle Weed Brush - Brown
features: Ideal for removing moss, grime & weeds, this brush is manufactured with a wooden head & handle with 3 rows of high strength wire bristles for targeted cleaning.
It also comes with a V blade scraper to help loosen stubborn buildup.
It is suitable for use on patios, paving & terraces.
With a dedicated Customer Service Team committed to providing peace of mind from our door to yours.
